title: Youmind 18969 Arcanist S Ledger
prompt: A detailed character design sheet for a male mage titled "The Arcanist's Ledger." The character has {argument name="hair" default="short, tousled auburn hair"}, pointed ears, and {argument name="horns" default="crystalline blue horns"}. He wears an ornate, floor-length {argument name="robe color" default="navy blue"} robe decorated with glowing celestial constellations and gold embroidery. The layout includes full front and back views, a side-profile headshot, and close-up technical drawings of his magical accessories: a crystal-tipped staff, a circular geometric pendant, and intricate ear cuffs. The aesthetic is a clean, vintage parchment style with structured annotations and calligraphic headings.
